MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summ Adjudiction
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Tesfaye Tsadik (510)839-3922 appearing via Zoom for plaintiff True Gospel Missionary Baptist Church.
Janet Li (925)746-7770 of Donahue Fitzgerald LLP appearing via Zoom for defendant TY Investment LLC
Reporter: Raquel Sharp; CSR# 10619; raquel@transcriptlegal.com; 925-384-0003

Plaintiff contests tentative ruling. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment/Adjudication is DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Notice of Motion and the Separate Statement do not comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Motion for Summary Judgment is denied. There are multiple triable issues of fact. See Plaintiff's Response to Defendant's Additional Material Facts.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Reported: Raquel Sharp; CSR# 10619; raquel@transcriptlegal.com; 925-384-0003

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction is GRANTED. Defendant TY Investment LLC and their foreclosure trustee, agents, servants, and employees, are enjoined from conducting any sale, conveyance of the real property commonly known as 106 Broad Street, San Francisco, California [hereinafter known as the property] or taking any action to sell, liquidate, convey or heyptheticate or any action other than to main the status quo of the property. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
